text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon suffers an injury during training, so
we go to get it treated.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Phew... Let's get a move on.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
To training, duh! There's more to training than
running.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
If I can't work on my legs, I'll work my arms and
back! I can't start slacking just 'cause I got hurt!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Urk... Ouch.
choice_data_list: You really need to rest up.
Let's take things slow and see how you do.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Why? What's wrong with a bit of strength
training?
choice_data_list: I don't want to risk your injury getting worse.
I don't want to risk your injury getting worse.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but it's a way bigger risk to not do any
training!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I am being patient!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, sorry for yelling at you.
choice_data_list: I'll work on a plan to speed up your recovery.
I'll work on a plan to speed up your recovery.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, thanks. I'll leave that to you and take it
easy, then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Hishi Amazon rests until her leg pain wears off.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: All right! Let's head to the gym an—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Agh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hish Amazon tips over the moment she tries to
stand up, but I thankfully manage to catch her
just in time.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Ugh! Ouch...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Teach. You saved me there.
choice_data_list: Maybe we should hold off on the training.
Maybe we should hold off on the training.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'm probably gonna make things worse at
this rate. I'll go home for today and rest up.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
This is exactly what you wanted from the
beginning, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But you knew I wouldn't have agreed if you
ordered me to rest...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right. I'll take some time off till my body's
back to normal!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon stays true to her word and rests
until her injury is fully healed.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: All right! Let's head to the gym an—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I get it. I'm trying not to put any strain on
my legs.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Geez, there's only so much training I can do like
this.
choice_data_list: Leave the training regimen to me.
Leave the training regimen to me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
As if you'd let me train on my own terms, eh?
Well, that's fine by me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You're the one who's compromising with me
despite how unreasonable I'm being, so I promise
I won't push myself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon trains around her injury and makes
a quick recovery.
